docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE PLANTIFF'S NEW ADDRESS -FILED AFTER DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORDON, TREVOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED)-FILED AFTER DISMISSAL SERVED AUG-29-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, BILL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TREVOR GORDON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BILL ENGLISH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GORDON, TREVOR AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
